mapper.insert: insert into resume (rno, mid, address, univ, major, career, experience, intro) values(seq_resume.nextVal, #{address}, #{univ}, #{major}, #{career}, #{experi}, #{intro})
mapper.update: update resume set address = #{address}, univ = #{univ}, major = #{major}, career = #{career}, experi = #{experi}, intro = #{intro} where rno = ?
